accelerator</div><div>2.ml-witness-proof end-to-end on-chip running with model split</div><div>3.Scheduler:</div><div><span style="white-space: normal;"><span style="white-space:pre">	</span>a.Frond-end &amp; back-end</span></div><div><span style="white-space: normal;"><span style="white-space:pre">	</span>b.Poly computing &amp; Commitment in the back-end.</span></div><div><span style="white-space: normal;"><span style="white-space:pre">		</span>Note: There is dependency issue between</span></div><div><span style="white-space: normal;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>Poly and Commitment. Scheduling&nbsp;</span></div><div><span style="white-space: normal;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>sub-modules between two parallel ZKP tasks</span></div><div><span style="white-space: normal;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>if possible.&nbsp;</span></div><div>4.Architectures - Focusing on the front-end and trace record.</div></div><div><br></div><div>Evaluation: FPGA implement for ResNet-18.</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="230" width="300" x="600" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
